title: agent-await-gates-impl: Status::Blocked + jjf block verb (v2.5 spec bump)
body:
# Goal

Tactical follow-up to the `agent-await-gates` research
ticket (`08bc9eb`, recommendation pinned in
`docs/agent-await-gates-design.md` §6). Add a `Blocked`
status variant so an issue can park itself out of
`jjf ready` while waiting on an external signal, without
paying the cost of polling architecture or external API
auth.

End state: `jjf block <id> --reason "<text>"` flips status
to blocked and posts the reason as a comment in a single
multi-op commit. `jjf open <id>` (already exists) clears it.
`Storage::list_ready` filters `Blocked` the same way it
filters `Closed`.

# Why now

Research closed in `08bc9eb` ruled out the full beads
gates feature (`await_type` / `await_id` / `jjf check-gates`)
for v1. The slim alternative — one new status variant —
gives operators a discoverable ready-suppression mechanism
without runtime network dependencies or a polling decision.

# Approach

## Storage layer

- Add `Status::Blocked` to `crates/jjf-storage/src/record.rs`
  (wire spelling `blocked`). Order: `Open | InProgress |
  Blocked | Closed`.
- Update `Storage::list_ready` to filter `Blocked` like
  `Closed`.
- Trailer parser: accept `blocked` as a valid status value
  in `Jjf-Status:` trailers.

## CLI layer

- New verb: `jjf block <id> [--reason <text>] [--json]`.
  Sets status to blocked and (if `--reason` is given) posts
  the reason as a comment in the same commit.
- `jjf open <id>` already exists for clearing.
- `--json` envelope: `{"ok": true, "id": "<id>"}`.

## Spec bump

- v2.4 → v2.5 in `docs/storage-format.md`. Mirror the v2.3
  `InProgress` changelog entry's shape: new wire value
  `blocked` in the status enum; pre-v2.5 readers surface
  the unknown variant via `Error::Json` (existing contract).

# Acceptance

- [ ] `Status::Blocked` lands in `record.rs` with wire
  spelling `blocked` and `as_str()` mapping.
- [ ] `Storage::list_ready` filters blocked issues out of
  ready by default; an `include_blocked` flag on
  `ReadyFilter` (mirroring `include_claimed`) flips them
  back in for "what's blocked" views.
- [ ] `jjf block <id> --reason "<text>"` lands the status
  flip and the comment in one commit.
- [ ] `jjf ls --status blocked` works (existing
  `--status all|open|closed` accepts the new value).
- [ ] `docs/storage-format.md` carries a v2.4 → v2.5
  changelog stanza describing the addition.
- [ ] `docs/cli-json.md` covers the new verb's JSON
  envelope.
- [ ] All workspace tests stay green.

# Out of scope

- `await_type` / `await_id` fields. Deliberately deferred
  per the research ticket's recommendation.
- `jjf check-gates` verb. Deliberately deferred.
- Polling architecture. Operators clear blocked tickets by
  hand via `jjf open <id>`.
- Forgejo / GitHub API integration in the CLI binary.

# Pointers

- Research doc: `docs/agent-await-gates-design.md`.
- Spec template for status enum bumps: `docs/storage-format.md`
  §"v2.2 → v2.3 changelog" (the `InProgress` addition).
- Source of the `--reason` pattern: beads' `bd defer
  --reason` (`reference/beads/cmd/bd/defer.go`).
